key_concepts__rules: - Structural org data from Volkswagen Corporate Directory (VCD) - SAFe org data manually maintained in a temporary DB - Both synced daily to LeanIX
- Most org units are modeled outside LeanIX - Few exceptions exist
- Only use Fact Sheets tagged "Synced" or "Manual" for modeling consumers or responsibilities
- No additional modeling rules apply since modeling occurs outside LeanIX
- Organizations can be assigned as users or responsible parties to any Fact Sheet - Assignments should be made from the perspective of the Fact Sheet
- Can be modeled at any hierarchy level - Example: If all sub-units of "FD" use a system, assign only "FD"
- Must be modeled at the deepest level of the org structure - Used to identify responsible managers when no individual is assigned - Example: Use "FDB1", not just "FDB"
- Manual creation allowed only with justification - Only for org units not part of official structure - Must involve responsible business unit - Tagged as "Manual"
- Changes from reorganizations (e.g., PPO) are automatically synced - If an org unit is unused, its Fact Sheet is archived
- If still linked to objects, the Fact Sheet is tagged "Legacy" - Fact Sheet owners must update/remove these relations - "Legacy"-tagged orgs must not be used in modeling
